samples.label: Path A — portal / contact question (clear KB content)

submission.subject: Where do I update our company GST and bank details?
submission.description: Hi Support, our entity recently changed its registered address and GST number. Where on the VQMS portal do I update the GST registration certificate and bank account details, and do these changes need a re-approval before they apply to outstanding invoices?

samples.label: Path C — too vague, expect triage

submission.subject: Question
submission.description: Hi, we have a query. Please get back to us when you can.
